title: Meta faces Tennessee trial over Instagram allegations
summary: STORY: Tennessee state claims Instagram's design is to blame for a youth mental-health crisis.Meta Platforms goes to court on Monday – one of several trials in the coming weeks...testing allegations that the company's social media platforms were intentionally built to be addictive.Tennessee accuses the company of violating the state's consumer protection law...by knowingly designing a product that drives teens to compulsive use...and misleading the public about its safety.The lawsuit, filed by the attorney general's office, claims Meta failed to disclose extensive internal research..showing Instagram could harm teens.And that it continued offering features it knew were dangerous without warning users.A Meta spokesperson said in a statement on Friday that the company already has built-in controls...to protect the hundreds of thousands of Tennessee teens who use social media every day.The company has argued the state's claims are based on the content posted on Instagram by its users...and that a federal law shields the company from liability for third-party content.The trial is slated to last for seven weeks.It's scheduled to overlap with at least two other trials against the company in courts in California.Meta faces thousands of lawsuits over similar claims in both state and federal court.Nearly every state in the country has filed claims against Meta over its platforms’ alleged impact on children.

Smucker Company emphasize that the successful adoption of AI technology hinges on adequate employee training, not just the acquisition of new tools. summary_zh: Direxion 每日三倍做多半导体 ETF（SOXL）盘前交易大涨 7.0%，至 193.3 美元，受半导体股在大幅抛售后强劲反弹推动。这一反弹归因于市场对强劲 AI 基础设施支出的信心重燃，OpenAI 潜在数据中心租赁消息和超大规模资本支出承诺强化了这一信心。尽管大盘下跌且强劲就业报告对成长股构成压力，但芯片股的快速企稳表明 AI 支出主题依然稳固。

title: Intel, Navan surge premarket; Oracle falls amid AI spending concerns
summary: U.S. stock index futures rose, led by technology shares, as reports of peace talks between the U.S. and Iran emerged. Oracle declined despite strong earnings due to increased AI-related capital spending plans. Intel and Navan surged premarket on positive news, while other movers included Brand Engagement Network, Coupang, Micron Technology, and Super Micro Computer.
title_zh: 英特尔、Navan 盘前大涨；甲骨文因 AI 支出担忧下跌
summary_zh: 美国股指期货上涨，科技股领涨，因美伊和谈消息传出。甲骨文（Oracle）尽管财报强劲，但因 AI 相关资本支出计划增加而下跌。英特尔（Intel）和 Navan 受利好消息推动盘前大涨。其他异动股包括 Brand Engagement Network、Coupang、美光科技（Micron Technology）和超微电脑（Super Micro Computer）。

title: M Holdings Securities Inc. Takes Position in Qualcomm Incorporated $QCOM
summary: M Holdings Securities Inc. has acquired a new stake in Qualcomm, purchasing 17,904 shares valued at $3.06 million during the fourth quarter. Qualcomm is gaining institutional interest, with a significant 74.35% of its stock held by institutions, and it is expanding its reach into AI and edge-computing markets. Despite these positive strategic developments, the stock is currently rated as a "Hold" by analysts and is experiencing weakness due to a broader semiconductor selloff.
title_zh: M Holdings Securities 建仓高通（Qualcomm）$QCOM
summary_zh: M Holdings Securities Inc. 在第四季度新买入高通（Qualcomm）17,904 股，价值 306 万美元。高通正获得机构关注，74.35% 的股票由机构持有，并正在向 AI 和边缘计算市场扩张。尽管有这些积极战略进展，但该股目前被分析师评为“持有”，并因半导体板块整体抛售而表现疲软。

title: Brookfield Corporation (BN) Renews Normal Course Issuer Bid to Repurchase 10% of Public Float
summary: Brookfield Corporation (BN) has renewed its normal course issuer bid, approved by the Toronto Stock Exchange, to repurchase up to 191,034,672 Class A Limited Voting Shares, representing 10% of its public float. The program began on May 27 and aims to provide flexibility in capital allocation, with acquired shares either cancelled or used for long-term incentive plans. An automatic share purchase plan is expected to be implemented around June 15 to facilitate these repurchases during restricted t
title_zh: Brookfield Corporation（BN）续签常规发行人要约，回购 10% 流通股
summary_zh: Brookfield Corporation（BN）续签了常规发行人要约，经多伦多证券交易所批准，将回购最多 191,034,672 股 A 类有限投票权股份，占其流通股的 10%。该计划于 5 月 27 日开始，旨在提供资本配置灵活性，回购的股份将被注销或用于长期激励计划。预计将在 6 月 15 日左右实施自动购股计划，以便在限制期内进行回购。

title: Supermicro Prices Concurrent Underwritten Public Offerings Of 45,454,545 Shares At $27.50 Per Share And 75,000,000 Depositary Shares, Each Worth 1/20th Of A Share Of Newly Issued 7.0% Series A Mandatory Convertible Preferred Stock, At $50 Per Share
summary: Super Micro Computer, Inc. (NASDAQ:SMCI) ("Supermicro" or the "Company"), a Total IT Solution Manufacturer for AI, Cloud, Storage, and 5G/Edge, today announced the pricing of its previously announced series of concurrent
title_zh: Supermicro 同步定价：4545 万股普通股每股 27.50 美元 + 7500 万存托股每股 50 美元
summary_zh: Supermicro 宣布同步公开发行定价：4545.45 万股普通股，每股 27.50 美元；以及 7500 万存托股（每份代表 1/20 股新发行的 7.0% A 系列强制可转换优先股），每股 50 美元。

title: The $7 Billion Reason Super Micro Computer Stock Is Down Today
summary: Super Micro stock tumbles as the company announces a $5 billion underwritten public offering. Here’s why the capital raise is bearish for SMCI shares.
title_zh: SMCI 今日下跌的 70 亿美元原因：增发稀释股东
summary_zh: Super Micro 股价大跌，因公司宣布 50 亿美元包销公开发行。资本筹集对 SMCI 股票构成利空，稀释现有股东权益。

title: SMCI Shares Dump 28% as AI Trade Gets Tested
summary: SMCI shares fell nearly 28% as the company announced a $7 billion equity raise. The selloff shows AI demand is strong, but meeting that demand is consuming enormous amounts of capital that dilutes shareholders.
title_zh: SMCI 暴跌 28%，AI 交易面临考验
summary_zh: SMCI 股价下跌近 28%，因公司宣布 70 亿美元股权融资。抛售表明 AI 需求强劲，但满足需求需消耗巨额资本，导致股东稀释。

title: Micron, Super Micro, Newmont, Robinhood, Casey’s, and More Stocks That Explain Today’s Market
summary: Micron and Super Micro stocks sink as the selloff in AI and other momentum stocks accelerates. Casey’s General Stores leads the S&P 500.
title_zh: 美光、超微电脑、纽蒙特、Robinhood、Casey's 等领跌/领涨今日市场
summary_zh: 美光 (Micron) 和超微电脑 (Super Micro) 股价下跌，AI 及其他动量股抛售加速。Casey's General Stores 领涨标普 500。

title: Super Micro, Newmont, Robinhood, Oracle, Cracker Barrel, and More Stocks That Explain Today’s Market
summary: Super Micro stock sinks as the selloff in AI and other momentum stocks accelerates. Robinhood leads the S&P 500.
title_zh: 超微电脑、纽蒙特、Robinhood、甲骨文、Cracker Barrel 等领跌/领涨今日市场
summary_zh: 超微电脑 (Super Micro) 股价下跌，AI 及其他动量股抛售加速。Robinhood 领涨标普 500。

title: Super Micro Stock Sinks After Announcing $7 Billion Equity Raise To Fund AI Backlog
summary: Super Micro Computer shares are under heavy pressure Wednesday after the AI server maker announced a $7 billion equity financing package.
title_zh: 超微电脑宣布 70 亿美元股权融资以支撑 AI 订单积压，股价重挫
summary_zh: AI 服务器制造商超微电脑 (Super Micro Computer) 周三宣布 70 亿美元股权融资方案，股价承压大跌。

title: Trump Officials Worry US Loophole Let Chinese Firms Buy Nvidia Blackwell Chips
summary: Trump administration officials are concerned that a loophole in US export restrictions may have allowed Chinese firms, such as Alibaba, to legally acquire advanced Nvidia AI chips outside of China. This situation has led to confusion and contradictory statements from different government agencies, particularly the Commerce Department's Bureau of Industry and Security (BIS), regarding the enforcement of AI chip export controls. The inconsistencies have raised alarm among lawmakers and experts abo
title_zh: 特朗普官员担忧：美国漏洞让中国企业买到英伟达Blackwell芯片
summary_zh: 特朗普政府官员担心，美国出口限制中的漏洞可能使阿里巴巴等中国企业合法地在境外获得先进的英伟达AI芯片。这导致不同政府机构（尤其是商务部工业与安全局BIS）在AI芯片出口管制执行上出现混乱和矛盾表态，引发立法者和专家的警觉。

title: Goldman Sachs Just Predicted SpaceX's AI Revenue Will Be This Number By 2030
summary: Goldman Sachs projects SpaceX's AI unit revenue to reach an astounding $322 billion by 2030, a significant jump from $3.2 billion in 2025. This aggressive forecast is part of the marketing for SpaceX's massive initial public offering, aiming for a $1.77 trillion valuation. However, the AI division faces substantial capital expenditures and losses, raising questions about the feasibility of such ambitious growth given current market competition.
title_zh: 高盛预测：SpaceX AI收入2030年将达3220亿美元
summary_zh: 高盛预测SpaceX的AI业务收入到2030年将飙升至3220亿美元，较2025年的32亿美元大幅跃升。这一激进预测是为SpaceX大规模IPO造势，目标估值1.77万亿美元。但AI部门面临巨额资本支出和亏损，在当前市场竞争下，如此高增长目标的可行性存疑。

title: TSMC says AI demand affecting supply
summary: TSMC announced that the explosive demand for AI chips is causing widespread supply constraints, leading the company to accelerate capacity expansion efforts. Chairman C.C. Wei expressed confidence in Taiwan's AI supply chain to maintain its competitive edge against foreign rivals and dismissed Samsung's goal of catching up as a "pipe dream." He also noted TSMC's record performance last year and strong growth trajectory for the future.
title_zh: 台积电：AI需求冲击供应，加速扩产
summary_zh: 台积电表示，AI芯片的爆炸性需求正导致广泛供应紧张，公司正加速产能扩张。董事长魏哲家对台湾AI供应链保持竞争力充满信心，并称三星追赶目标是“白日梦”。他还指出台积电去年业绩创纪录，未来增长势头强劲。

title: What's Going On With NVIDIA Stock Thursday?
summary: NVIDIA began shipping new AI networking switches developed with Taiwan Semiconductor, designed to improve data transmission and reduce power consumption in AI data centers. CEO Jensen Huang emphasized the "insanely profitable" returns on AI spending, while the stock experienced a slight pullback due to a broader tech sell-off. Analysts maintain a generally positive outlook, with an average price target of $324.04 and a "Buy" consensus.
title_zh: 英伟达周四动态：新AI网络交换机开始出货
summary_zh: 英伟达开始出货与台积电联合开发的新AI网络交换机，旨在改善AI数据中心的数据传输并降低功耗。CEO黄仁勋强调AI支出的“疯狂高回报”，但股价因科技板块整体抛售小幅回调。分析师维持总体乐观，平均目标价324.04美元，共识评级“买入”。

title: Micron Drops 7% as Broadcom’s Disappointing AI Outlook Triggers a Semiconductor Selloff
summary: Micron Technology (MU) shares fell by 7% due to Broadcom's (AVGO) underwhelming AI chip outlook, despite no specific negative news for Micron. Broadcom's guidance for Q3 AI chip sales ($16 billion vs. $17.2 billion estimated) triggered a broader selloff across the memory and AI chip sector, impacting companies like SanDisk and Western Digital. While Micron's fundamentals remain strong with significant revenue growth and HBM orders into 2027, the market reacted to the AI capex narrative wobble.
title_zh: 美光跌7%：博通AI展望不及预期引发半导体抛售
summary_zh: 美光科技 (MU) 股价下跌7%，因博通 (AVGO) 的AI芯片展望令人失望，尽管美光自身并无负面消息。博通对Q3 AI芯片销售的指引（160亿美元 vs 预估172亿美元）引发了整个存储和AI芯片板块的抛售，波及SanDisk和西部数据。美光基本面依然强劲，营收大幅增长且HBM订单已排至2027年，但市场对AI资本支出叙事出现动摇做出反应。

title: Apollo Shops $36 Billion Debt Deal to Buy Google Chips for Anthropic
summary: Apollo Global Management Inc. and Blackstone Inc. are seeking additional investors for a $36 billion debt financing deal aimed at helping Anthropic PBC build its AI infrastructure. This debt will be used to acquire Google's custom TPU chips, which Anthropic will then lease. Broadcom Inc., a partner in developing these chips with Google, is reportedly backstopping payments for the largest parts of this transaction.
title_zh: 阿波罗为Anthropic融资360亿美元债务，用于购买谷歌芯片
summary_zh: 阿波罗全球管理和黑石集团正为一项360亿美元的债务融资交易寻找更多投资者，以帮助Anthropic PBC建设AI基础设施。这笔债务将用于购买谷歌定制的TPU芯片，Anthropic随后将租赁这些芯片。与谷歌合作开发这些芯片的博通据悉为交易最大部分提供支付担保。

title: Western Digital Adds AI Veteran Manuvir Das To Guide Storage Focus
summary: Western Digital (NasdaqGS:WDC) has appointed Manuvir Das, an AI veteran with experience from NVIDIA, Dell EMC, and Microsoft, to its board of directors. This strategic appointment aims to enhance Western Digital's capabilities in AI infrastructure and cloud-scale storage, aligning with the growing demand for high-capacity, high-performance storage driven by AI and large language models. The move is expected to influence the company's product focus, partnerships, and capital allocation in the lon
title_zh: 西部数据任命AI老兵Manuvir Das指导存储战略
summary_zh: 西部数据 (WDC) 任命来自英伟达、戴尔EMC和微软的AI资深人士Manuvir Das为董事会成员。此举旨在增强西部数据在AI基础设施和云规模存储方面的能力，以应对AI和大语言模型驱动的高容量、高性能存储需求。预计将影响公司长期产品重点、合作伙伴关系和资本配置。

title: The “Don’t Fight Trump” Trade Is Working: S&P 500 Ignores Everything and Keeps Surging
summary: The S&P 500 has surged 30% since Election Day 2024, largely driven by dominant AI, defense, and manufacturing sectors, despite elevated inflation and geopolitical tensions. This trend, dubbed the "Don't Fight Trump" trade, reflects the market's belief that political events do not significantly impact corporate earnings, especially with a massive AI spending cycle boosting key companies. However, concerns exist regarding extreme index concentration, high forward earnings multiples, and extended p
title_zh: "别跟特朗普作对"交易奏效：标普500无视一切持续飙升
summary_zh: 自2024年大选日以来，标普500已飙升30%，主要由AI、国防和制造业龙头股推动，尽管通胀高企和地缘政治紧张。这种“别跟特朗普作对”交易反映了市场认为政治事件不会显著影响企业盈利，尤其是在大规模AI支出周期提振关键公司的情况下。但指数集中度极高、远期市盈率偏高和仓位过度延伸引发担忧。

title: Cerebras’ Stock Sees Blockbuster Demand, Setting Stage for AI IPO Frenzy
summary: Cerebras Systems, an AI-focused semiconductor chipmaker, experienced blockbuster demand during its IPO, with shares opening at $350 after pricing at $185. The company's IPO success is seen as a harbinger for a surge in AI public offerings, including anticipated listings from SpaceX (xAI), Anthropic, and OpenAI later this year. Cerebras, positioning itself as an alternative to Nvidia in the AI inference market, has shifted its strategy to offer cloud access to its expensive chips, resonating with
title_zh: Cerebras 股票需求火爆，AI 上市潮蓄势待发
summary_zh: AI 芯片制造商 Cerebras Systems 在 IPO 中需求火爆，发行价 $185，开盘价 $350。其 IPO 成功被视为 AI 公司上市潮的前兆，包括 SpaceX（xAI）、Anthropic 和 OpenAI 预计年内上市。Cerebras 定位为 AI 推理市场英伟达的替代者，已转向提供云端访问其昂贵芯片的策略，获得市场认可。

title: Earnings live updates: Applied Materials stock rises on strong AI de, Figma stock surges
summary: This article provides live updates on various companies' first-quarter earnings reports. Applied Materials and Figma both saw their stocks rise due to strong demand driven by AI spending. Other companies like Klarna, Cisco, On Holding, and Plug Power also reported positive results, while Birkenstock, Alibaba, and Hims & Hers experienced declines or losses.
title_zh: 财报实时：Applied Materials 因 AI 需求走强上涨，Figma 飙升
summary_zh: 本文提供多家公司一季度财报实时更新。Applied Materials 和 Figma 因 AI 支出驱动的强劲需求而股价上涨。Klarna、Cisco、On Holding、Plug Power 等公司业绩正面，而 Birkenstock、Alibaba、Hims & Hers 则出现下跌或亏损。

title: Nvidia Stock Erupts To New Highs — Cantor Fitzgerald Sees 49% More Upside
summary: Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) stock reached new all-time highs following a Cantor Fitzgerald analyst's reiterated "Overweight" rating and raised price target to $350. The analyst, CJ Muse, believes Nvidia's compute supply is sold out for 2026 and 2027, foreseeing continued year-over-year growth through 2028-2029 due to strong AI demand. Muse expects Nvidia to exceed expectations in its upcoming May 20 earnings report, driven by robust demand from major AI players like Anthropic and OpenAI.
title_zh: 英伟达股价创新高，Cantor Fitzgerald 看涨 49%
summary_zh: 英伟达（NASDAQ: NVDA）股价创历史新高，Cantor Fitzgerald 分析师重申“增持”评级，并将目标价上调至 $350。分析师 CJ Muse 认为英伟达 2026-2027 年计算供应已售罄，AI 需求强劲将推动 2028-2029 年持续同比增长。他预计 5 月 20 日财报将超预期，主要受 Anthropic、OpenAI 等大客户需求驱动。

title: Applied Optoelectronics Crashes 14%, Coherent Slides 10%, Lumentum Falls 7% as Optics Trade Cools
summary: Shares of Applied Optoelectronics, Coherent, and Lumentum experienced significant drops, with AAOI down 14% ahead of its earnings report. This sector-wide selloff in optics is attributed to profit-taking after explosive rallies, despite the underlying structural demand for AI datacenters remaining intact. Investors are now watching Applied Optoelectronics' post-market earnings call for future guidance.
title_zh: 光学板块降温：AAOI 跌 14%，Coherent 跌 10%，Lumentum 跌 7%
summary_zh: Applied Optoelectronics、Coherent 和 Lumentum 股价大幅下跌，AAOI 在财报前跌 14%。此轮光学板块抛售被视为前期暴涨后的获利了结，尽管 AI 数据中心的结构性需求依然稳固。投资者正关注 Applied Optoelectronics 盘后财报电话会议中的未来指引。

title: Layoffs Don’t Deliver AI ROI—Redeploying Workers Does, Data Shows
summary: A new Gartner study challenges the common belief that layoffs are an effective way to achieve ROI from AI investments. Instead, the research suggests that redeploying workers to higher-value tasks after AI implementation leads to greater long-term gains. Many companies, however, still resort to headcount reductions to offset AI spending, a strategy Gartner argues does not generate true return.
title_zh: 数据表明：裁员无法带来 AI 投资回报，重新部署员工才是关键
summary_zh: Gartner 最新研究挑战了裁员能有效实现 AI 投资回报的普遍观点。研究指出，AI 实施后将员工重新部署到更高价值岗位才能带来长期收益。然而，许多公司仍通过裁员来抵消 AI 支出，Gartner 认为这种策略无法产生真正的回报。

title: LAWSUIT ALERT: Investors who lost over $250,000 in Super Micro Computer, Inc. (NASDAQ: SMCI) shares purchased between April 2024 and March 2026 should contact the Shareholders Foundation
summary: The Shareholders Foundation has announced a May 26, 2026, deadline for investors who lost over $250,000 in Super Micro Computer, Inc. (NASDAQ: SMCI) shares purchased between April 2024 and March 2026 to join a pending lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that Super Micro Computer failed to disclose that a significant portion of its server sales were to companies in China, violating U.S. export control laws. Investors who meet the criteria are urged to contact the Shareholders Foundation for legal option
title_zh: 诉讼警报：Super Micro Computer（NASDAQ: SMCI）投资者注意
summary_zh: Shareholders Foundation 宣布，2024 年 4 月至 2026 年 3 月期间购买 Super Micro Computer（NASDAQ: SMCI）股票且损失超过 $250,000 的投资者，需在 2026 年 5 月 26 日前加入待决诉讼。诉讼指控 Super Micro 未披露其大量服务器销售给中国公司，违反美国出口管制法律。符合条件的投资者被敦促联系该机构了解法律选项。

title: Nvidia inks US$500 million deal with fiber-optic maker Corning
summary: Nvidia has entered into a $500 million deal with fiber-optic cable maker Corning, acquiring rights for shares and expanding AI infrastructure. Corning will increase its US fiber production capacity by over 50 percent to support AI data centers, creating over 3,000 new jobs. This partnership highlights the increasing importance of fiber-optic connections for high-speed data transfer in AI computing and reinforces Nvidia's strategy of investing across the AI ecosystem.
title_zh: 英伟达与光纤制造商 Corning 签署 5 亿美元协议
summary_zh: 英伟达与光纤电缆制造商 Corning 达成 5 亿美元协议，获得股票认购权并扩大 AI 基础设施。Corning 将把美国光纤产能提升 50% 以上以支持 AI 数据中心，创造超 3,000 个就业岗位。该合作凸显光纤连接在 AI 计算高速数据传输中的重要性，并强化英伟达投资 AI 生态系统的战略。

title: Why Lam Research Still Looks Like a Buy After a 300% Rally
summary: Lam Research Corporation (LRCX) has seen its stock rally significantly due to the AI boom, with a nearly 300% increase in the last year. Strong Q4 earnings confirmed the underlying business's benefit from surging semiconductor demand, and new speculation about SpaceX's semiconductor expansion has further fueled interest, with Lam Research reportedly being an equipment supplier. Despite the stock being technically overbought, analysts maintain bullish ratings, suggesting continued upside potentia
title_zh: Lam Research 暴涨 300% 后为何仍值得买入
summary_zh: Lam Research Corporation（LRCX）因 AI 热潮股价大幅上涨，过去一年涨幅近 300%。强劲的四季度财报确认了其业务受益于半导体需求激增，而 SpaceX 半导体扩张的新传闻进一步点燃兴趣，Lam Research 据报为其设备供应商。尽管技术上超买，分析师仍维持看涨评级，认为上行潜力持续。

title: Element Solutions Inc (ESI) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Highlights: Re
summary: Element Solutions Inc (ESI) reported a record first quarter in 2026, showcasing double-digit organic sales growth and significant margin expansion, particularly in its Electronics segment, driven by AI infrastructure and high-performance electronics. Despite navigating challenges from geopolitical events and inflationary pressures, and experiencing negative free cash flow due to high working capital and increased metal prices, the company remains optimistic about continued growth. ESI is investi
title_zh: Element Solutions Q1创纪录，电子板块受AI驱动增长
summary_zh: Element Solutions Inc (ESI) 2026年Q1业绩创纪录，电子板块实现双位数有机销售增长和利润率扩张，主要受AI基础设施和高性能电子需求推动。尽管面临地缘政治和通胀压力，且因营运资本和金属价格上涨导致自由现金流为负，公司仍对持续增长保持乐观。

title: Goldman Sachs favors hyperscalers over chipmakers in AI infrastructure
summary: Goldman Sachs analyst Jim Covello suggests that investors should favor hyperscalers over chipmakers to profit from the AI infrastructure buildout. This recommendation is based on the belief that the market has undervalued hyperscalers, despite their significant capital spending on data centers, while chip stocks have already seen substantial gains. Covello posits that if hyperscalers demonstrate a positive return on investment, their valuations could recover, offering more upside than the alread

summary_zh: 随着对AI科技巨头高估值的担忧加剧，部分投资者将目光转向支撑AI物理需求的基础设施公司。这一转变催生了新的金融产品，多只基础设施相关股票今年录得两位数涨幅。尽管AI基础设施板块估值上升需谨慎，但芯片制造、数据中心和电力公用事业等提供关键服务的公司仍受关注。

title: Applied Materials (AMAT) Is Up 8.7% After Strong Q1 Results And Major AI-Focused Expansion Moves
summary: Applied Materials (AMAT) reported strong Q1 2026 results with significant revenue and net income, alongside resolving an export-control matter. The company is heavily investing in AI infrastructure, including new chipmaking tools and a $5 billion R&D center, and projects strong revenue for Q2 2026. These developments reinforce its growth narrative, driven by AI demand and recent customer spending, despite ongoing geopolitical risks related to export controls.
title_zh: 应用材料(AMAT)Q1业绩强劲+AI扩张举措，股价涨8.7%
summary_zh: 应用材料(AMAT)公布2026财年Q1强劲业绩，营收和净利润显著增长，并解决了出口管制问题。公司正大力投资AI基础设施，包括新芯片制造工具和50亿美元研发中心，并给出Q2强劲营收指引。AI需求及近期客户支出强化其增长叙事，但出口管制相关地缘政治风险仍存。

title: Record Defense AI Spending Opens a Procurement Window
summary: The Pentagon is significantly increasing its investment in AI-driven platforms with a first-ever standalone budget line of $13.4 billion for autonomy, as the U.S. Army consolidates its helicopter pilot training and the Defense Innovation Unit seeks orchestration software. Companies like VisionWave Holdings, Lockheed Martin, Northrop Grumman, Archer Aviation, and Woodward are key players in this procurement cycle, developing critical perception, training, and control systems. VisionWave Holdings,
title_zh: 国防AI支出创纪录，开启采购窗口
summary_zh: 五角大楼大幅增加AI驱动平台投资，首次设立134亿美元自主系统独立预算。美国陆军整合直升机飞行员培训，国防创新单元寻求编排软件。VisionWave Holdings、洛克希德马丁(LMT)、诺斯罗普格鲁曼(NOC)、Archer Aviation(ACHR)和Woodward(WWD)等公司是这一采购周期的关键参与者，开发感知、训练和控制系统。

title: Stock Market Today: SPY, QQQ Tumble on Trio of Weak Jobs Data as Rate Cut Odds Surge
summary: The S&P 500 ETF (SPY) and Nasdaq 100 ETF (QQQ) both fell over 1% due to weak labor market data and a tech stock selloff, leading to increased odds of an interest rate cut. Job cuts in January were the highest for the month since 2009, and initial jobless claims rose above estimates, with significant layoffs from UPS and Amazon. These indicators of a slowing job market are fueling more aggressive predictions for a rate cut by the Federal Reserve.
title_zh: SPY/QQQ 因就业数据疲软大跌，降息预期飙升
summary_zh: SPY 和 QQQ 均跌超 1%，因劳动力市场数据疲软及科技股抛售，降息概率上升。1 月裁员人数创 2009 年以来同期新高，初请失业金人数超预期，UPS 和 Amazon 大幅裁员。就业市场放缓迹象推动市场对美联储更激进的降息押注。

title: GOOG stock whipsaws after Alphabet flags up to $185 billion in AI capex
summary: Alphabet's Class C shares experienced significant volatility after the company announced plans to nearly double its capital spending on AI infrastructure, projecting $175 billion to $185 billion in capex for 2026. This aggressive investment, despite strong Q4 earnings and cloud growth, has raised investor concerns about the timeline and ultimate payoff of such large-scale AI expenditures. The market is increasingly questioning whether these massive investments by tech giants will justify their c
title_zh: GOOG 股价震荡：Alphabet AI 资本支出高达 1850 亿美元
summary_zh: Alphabet C 类股大幅波动，公司计划将 AI 基础设施资本支出翻倍，2026 年资本支出预计达 1750 亿至 1850 亿美元。尽管 Q4 业绩和云业务增长强劲，但激进投资引发市场对回报时间表的担忧。投资者质疑科技巨头大规模 AI 支出能否证明其合理性。

title: Western Digital stock price falls after-hours as CEO share sale filing hits focus
summary: Western Digital shares fell 3.4% after-hours after the CEO offloaded 20,000 shares, even as the company announced a $4 billion share buyback and outlined plans for new high-capacity hard drives for AI applications. Investors are weighing the impact of AI on long-term pricing power and monitoring whether capital allocation strategies will truly support growth. Citi, however, maintained a "Buy" rating with an increased price target.
title_zh: Western Digital 盘后跌 3.4%：CEO 抛售 2 万股
summary_zh: Western Digital 盘后跌 3.4%，因 CEO 抛售 2 万股，尽管公司宣布 40 亿美元回购并计划推出 AI 用高容量硬盘。投资者权衡 AI 对长期定价能力的影响，关注资本配置策略能否支撑增长。花旗维持“买入”评级并上调目标价。

title: Applied Materials (AMAT) stock snaps back near $300 as Alphabet AI spend stirs chip-equipment trade
summary: Applied Materials (AMAT) shares rose after a previous day's drop, alongside other chip-equipment stocks, in response to Alphabet's projected near-doubling of capital expenditure, signaling increased demand for data centers and equipment. Citi raised its price target for AMAT to $400, anticipating positive spending revisions from customers. Investors are now focused on AMAT's upcoming fiscal first-quarter earnings report on February 12th for insights into AI spending and the impact of export cont
title_zh: AMAT 反弹至 300 美元附近：Alphabet AI 支出提振芯片设备股
summary_zh: Applied Materials 股价从前一日下跌中反弹，跟随其他芯片设备股上涨，因 Alphabet 资本支出近乎翻倍，预示数据中心和设备需求增加。花旗将 AMAT 目标价上调至 400 美元，预计客户将上调支出。市场关注 2 月 12 日 AMAT 的 Q1 财报，以获取 AI 支出和出口管制影响线索。

title: Why Alphabet (GOOGL) stock crashed today, Feb 5: what happened to Alphabet shares as the US stock market t
summary: Alphabet (GOOGL) stock plummeted today, February 5th, following a massive $185 billion capital expenditure forecast for 2026, which nearly doubles its previous spending and ignited fears over profitability despite beating revenue estimates. This aggressive "AI-first" pivot, aimed at bolstering AI infrastructure, caused a widespread selloff felt across the US stock market, including the S&P 500, Dow Jones, and Nasdaq Composite, as investors questioned if AI returns could justify such historic cos
title_zh: GOOGL 暴跌：1850 亿美元 AI 资本支出引发盈利担忧
summary_zh: Alphabet 股价 2 月 5 日暴跌，因 2026 年资本支出预测高达 1850 亿美元，较此前近乎翻倍，尽管营收超预期，但盈利担忧加剧。激进的“AI 优先”转型旨在加强 AI 基础设施，引发美股广泛抛售，波及 SPY、道指和纳指，投资者质疑 AI 回报能否覆盖历史性成本。

title: NETGEAR Q4 Earnings & Revenues Beat Estimates, Q1 Guidance Provided
summary: NETGEAR (NTGR) reported Q4 2025 non-GAAP earnings of 26 cents per share, significantly beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of 5 cents, with net revenues of $182.5 million also surpassing expectations. The company's performance was boosted by its higher-margin enterprise segment and strong recurring revenues from its Armor security offering, leading to a 10% pre-market share price increase. Despite positive Q4 results, NETGEAR anticipates challenges in Q1 2026 due to DDR4 memory shortages and so
title_zh: 网件(NTGR)Q4业绩超预期，提供Q1指引
summary_zh: 网件(NTGR)2025年Q4非GAAP每股收益0.26美元，远超Zacks一致预期的0.05美元，营收1.825亿美元同样超预期。高利润企业业务和Armor安全产品的经常性收入提振业绩，盘前股价涨10%。尽管Q4表现积极，但公司预计2026年Q1因DDR4内存短缺和部分因素面临挑战。

title: Nvidia may not release new gaming chip this year due to memory shortage: report (NVDA:NASDAQ)
summary: Due to an ongoing memory supply crunch, Nvidia may not release a new gaming GPU in 2026. The company is reportedly prioritizing its existing memory supply instead of launching new products. This decision comes as the memory shortage affects the tech industry.
title_zh: NVDA 或因内存短缺 2026 年不发布新游戏芯片
summary_zh: 由于持续的内存供应紧张，Nvidia 可能不会在 2026 年发布新游戏 GPU。公司优先保障现有内存供应而非推出新品。内存短缺正影响整个科技行业。

title: Oracle's Larry Ellison is down an unmatched $49 billion this year after the plunge in software stocks
summary: Oracle cofounder Larry Ellison has seen his net worth drop by an "unmatched" $49 billion this year, largely due to a 5% slump in Oracle stock. This decline follows a broader sell-off in software stocks, fueled by fears that new AI tools like Anthropic's Claude Cowork AI agent could reduce corporate demand for traditional software. Despite Oracle's significant investments in the AI boom, some analysts, like Michael Burry, have expressed concerns about the company's aggressive spending and growing
title_zh: 甲骨文(ORCL)埃里森今年财富缩水490亿美元，软件股暴跌
summary_zh: 甲骨文联合创始人拉里·埃里森今年净资产“无与伦比地”缩水490亿美元，主要因甲骨文股价下跌5%。这轮软件股抛售源于市场担忧Anthropic的Claude Cowork AI代理等新AI工具可能减少企业对传统软件的需求。尽管甲骨文大力投资AI，但Michael Burry等分析师对其激进支出和债务增长表示担忧。

title: AI Spending Pays Off for Major Cloud Providers
summary: New research indicates that major cloud providers like Alphabet, Amazon, Meta, and Microsoft have seen their AI infrastructure investments pay off, with their combined capital expenditures more than doubling between 2022 and 2025 alongside a significant increase in return on invested capital (ROIC). This profitability gain is attributed to strong utilization of new compute infrastructure and robust cloud revenue. The Alger 35 ETF (ATFV) is highlighted as an investment option for those seeking ex
title_zh: AI 支出回报显现：主要云提供商 ROIC 提升
summary_zh: 新研究显示，Alphabet、Amazon、Meta 和 Microsoft 等主要云提供商的 AI 基础设施投资已见回报，2022 至 2025 年合计资本支出翻倍以上，同时 ROIC 显著提升。盈利增长归因于新计算基础设施的高利用率和强劲云收入。Alger 35 ETF 被列为寻求 AI 敞口的投资选项。

title: Apple sees biggest sales jump in 4 years, powered by 'staggering' iPhone demand
summary: Apple reported its largest sales jump in four years, driven by strong iPhone 17 demand, particularly in North America and China. The company achieved $143.8 billion in revenue in its fiscal first quarter, a 16% increase year-over-year, despite tariff costs and increased AI spending. CEO Tim Cook also confirmed that Apple's Siri will integrate with Google's Gemini AI, viewing it as a collaboration for future models.
title_zh: 苹果iPhone需求强劲，创四年来最大销售增幅
summary_zh: 苹果公布四年来最大销售增幅，受iPhone 17需求强劲推动，尤其在北美和中国市场。第一财季营收达1438亿美元，同比增长16%，尽管面临关税成本和AI支出增加。CEO Tim Cook确认Siri将整合Google Gemini AI，视其为未来机型合作。

title: Celestica shares slump on caution over heavy AI spending despite strong quarter
summary: Despite Celestica Inc. reporting strong fourth-quarter earnings, beating analyst expectations, and raising its financial outlook due to surging demand for AI data-center equipment, its stock fell by 15%. This decline suggests investor caution over the sustainability of massive AI infrastructure spending, particularly as Celestica plans to significantly increase its capital expenditures. Investors are questioning whether the financial returns from this record AI spending are clear enough to justi
title_zh: Celestica财报强劲但AI支出引担忧，股价大跌15%
summary_zh: 尽管Celestica Inc.第四季度财报超预期，并因AI数据中心设备需求激增上调业绩展望，其股价仍下跌15%。这一跌幅反映投资者对巨额AI基础设施支出可持续性的谨慎态度，尤其是Celestica计划大幅增加资本支出。市场质疑创纪录的AI投入能否带来清晰财务回报。

title: CFO David Zinsner Is Buying Intel Stock. Should You?
summary: Intel's CFO, David Zinsner, recently purchased 5,882 shares of INTC stock at $42.50 each following a significant post-earnings selloff, signaling his confidence in the company's long-term prospects despite a weak Q1 guidance. The company is investing heavily in its foundry business, particularly its 18A and 14A manufacturing technologies, aiming to compete with Taiwan Semiconductor and potentially attract major clients like Nvidia. However, Intel faces challenges including recent net losses, del
title_zh: Intel CFO 增持股票：是否该跟进？
summary_zh: Intel CFO David Zinsner 在财报后抛售中买入 5,882 股 INTC，每股 42.50 美元，显示对公司长期前景的信心，尽管 Q1 指引疲弱。公司大力投资代工业务，特别是 18A 和 14A 制程技术，旨在与台积电竞争并吸引 Nvidia 等大客户。但 Intel 面临近期净亏损和债务等挑战。

title: Stock market today: S&P 500, Nasdaq sink as Microsoft's post-earnings plunge drags tech down
summary: US stocks, particularly the S&P 500 and Nasdaq, experienced a tech-driven selloff after Microsoft's earnings report spooked investors, causing its stock to plunge over 10%. Despite Meta's strong revenue outlook and subsequent stock gains, concerns about Microsoft's capital spending and slowing cloud sales, alongside Tesla's shift in strategy and first-ever annual revenue decline, contributed to the market dip. Geopolitical tensions between the US and Iran also caused gold and oil prices to rally
title_zh: 微软财报拖累科技股，标普500与纳指重挫
summary_zh: 美国股市，尤其是标普500和纳斯达克，因微软财报令投资者失望、股价暴跌超10%而遭遇科技股抛售。尽管Meta营收前景强劲且股价上涨，但市场对微软资本支出和云业务销售放缓的担忧，叠加特斯拉战略转变及首次年度营收下滑，共同拖累大盘。此外，美伊地缘政治紧张局势推动黄金和原油价格上涨。

title: NYSE Content Advisory: Pre-Market Update + York Space Systems to Debut on NYSE After IPO
summary: The NYSE is providing a pre-market update announcing slight gains in U.S. equities due to Meta and Microsoft earnings and an unchanged Fed rate, with the S&P 500 hitting a new record. York Space Systems is going public on the NYSE with a $4.3 billion valuation at $34 per share, and its executive team will ring the opening bell. The NYSE will continue its focus on the space sector with an upcoming Space Summit and will discuss tech earnings and AI spending on NYSE Live.
title_zh: 纽交所盘前更新：York Space Systems上市，科技股受关注
summary_zh: 纽交所发布盘前更新，受Meta和微软财报及美联储利率不变影响，美股小幅上涨，标普500创新高。York Space Systems以每股34美元、估值43亿美元在纽交所上市，高管团队将敲响开市钟。纽交所将继续聚焦太空领域，举办太空峰会，并在纽交所直播中讨论科技股财报和AI支出。

title: Marvell receives early termination notice from FTC on Celestial acquisition (MRVL:NASDAQ)
summary: Marvell Technology, Inc. (MRVL) received an early termination notice from the Federal Trade Commission regarding its pending acquisition of artificial intelligence semiconductor startup Celestial. The acquisition was initially announced by Marvell's CEO Matt Murphy in December. This notice allows the acquisition to proceed without further delay from the FTC.
title_zh: Marvell收购AI芯片初创公司Celestial获FTC提前终止通知
summary_zh: Marvell Technology, Inc. (MRVL) 收到美国联邦贸易委员会关于其收购AI半导体初创公司Celestial的提前终止通知。该收购由Marvell CEO Matt Murphy于12月首次宣布。此通知允许收购无需FTC进一步延迟即可推进。

title: Friend This ETF for a Meta Rebound
summary: Shares of Facebook parent Meta (META) have dropped significantly in recent months, largely due to investor concerns over its increased artificial intelligence (AI) expenditures. Despite this, the Direxion Daily META Bull 2X Shares (METU) could be an attractive option for tactical traders, especially considering Meta's strong advertising business. Analysts suggest that if Meta can effectively tie its AI spending to augmenting its ad technology, investor confidence may return, potentially offering
title_zh: 押注Meta反弹：关注Direxion 2倍做多ETF (METU)
summary_zh: Facebook母公司Meta (META) 股价近期大幅下跌，主要因投资者担忧其AI支出增加。尽管如此，Direxion Daily META Bull 2X Shares (METU) 对战术交易者可能具有吸引力，尤其是Meta广告业务强劲。分析师认为，若Meta能将AI支出有效用于增强广告技术，投资者信心可能恢复，从而带来反弹机会。

title: Assessing Hesai Group (HSAI) Valuation After New NVIDIA Partnership And Major Lidar Capacity Expansion
summary: Hesai Group (HSAI) is gaining attention due to new partnerships with NVIDIA and MOVIN, coupled with plans to double its annual lidar production capacity to over 4 million units by 2026. Despite a significant share price increase of 75.99% over the last year, Simply Wall St assesses the company as potentially 11.5% undervalued with a fair value of US$30.06, considering projected 2025 LiDAR shipments of 1.2 to 1.5 million units and strong revenue growth. However, its high P/E ratio of 67.4x, compa
title_zh: 禾赛科技 (HSAI) 估值分析：英伟达合作与产能扩张
summary_zh: 禾赛集团 (HSAI) 因与英伟达和MOVIN的新合作，以及计划到2026年将激光雷达年产能翻倍至400万台以上而备受关注。尽管股价过去一年上涨75.99%，Simply Wall St评估其可能被低估11.5%，公允价值为30.06美元，基于2025年120万至150万台出货量和强劲营收增长。然而，其67.4倍市盈率较高，需谨慎评估。

title: Why Are AMD (AMD) Shares Soaring Today
summary: Shares of AMD jumped 5.7% after the company announced groundbreaking Ryzen AI test results, showcasing its new Ryzen AI processors with a neural processing unit (NPU) performing at 10.5 tera operations per second. This news led Wells Fargo to reiterate an Overweight rating and name AMD its top pick for 2026, while RBC Capital initiated coverage with a 'Sector Perform' rating, driven by expectations of "insatiable data center compute demand." The stock also saw a previous gain after KeyBanc upgra
title_zh: AMD (AMD) 股价大涨5.7%：Ryzen AI测试结果亮眼
summary_zh: AMD股价上涨5.7%，此前公司公布突破性Ryzen AI测试结果，其新型Ryzen AI处理器神经处理单元 (NPU) 性能达10.5万亿次操作/秒。富国银行重申“增持”评级，并将AMD列为2026年首选股；RBC Capital给予“行业表现”评级，看好“数据中心计算需求旺盛”。此前KeyBanc上调评级也推动股价上涨。

title: Memory Shortage to Hit Nvidia China Approvals, US Lawmaker Says
summary: A US lawmaker, Representative John Moolenaar, has stated that a shortage of memory chips will limit the number of export licenses granted to Nvidia for selling its H200 AI processors to Chinese customers. This constraint is due to Commerce Department rules requiring exporters to certify that approved shipments will not cause a shortage in the US market, with DRAM being a critical component for AI accelerators.
title_zh: 美议员：内存短缺将限制英伟达对华出口许可
summary_zh: 美国众议员 John Moolenaar 表示，内存芯片短缺将限制英伟达（Nvidia）向中国客户销售 H200 AI 处理器的出口许可数量。根据商务部规定，出口商须证明获批出货不会导致美国市场短缺，而 DRAM 是 AI 加速器的关键组件。

title: Applied Materials jumps after Barclays lifts rating on AI-driven spending outlook
summary: Barclays upgraded Applied Materials (AMAT) stock to Overweight from Equal-Weight, citing expectations of increased capital expenditure driven by AI-related demand from memory and logic chipmakers. The firm raised its price target to $220, predicting robust spending trends through 2025 as the industry invests in new fabs and high-bandwidth memory for AI. This positive outlook led to a significant jump in Applied Materials' stock price.
title_zh: 巴克莱上调评级，应用材料（AMAT）因 AI 支出前景大涨
summary_zh: 巴克莱将应用材料（AMAT）评级从“平配”上调至“超配”，理由是内存和逻辑芯片制造商受 AI 需求推动，资本支出预期增加。目标价上调至 220 美元，预计行业投资新晶圆厂和 AI 高带宽内存将带动 2025 年前强劲支出趋势，该股随即大幅上涨。

title: Real AI Crisis Is Compute Shortage, Not Bubble, Says Daniel Newman: 'Those Calling For A Bubble Don't Understand What's Happening'
summary: Futurum Group CEO Daniel Newman argues that the real crisis in the AI industry is not a market bubble, but a severe global shortage of compute power necessary to meet the demands of a "multi-decade super-cycle." He believes that as "agentic" AI systems advance, compute intensity will reach unsustainable levels, leading to a critical hardware shortage in the next 5-10 years. Newman predicts 2026 will be a pivotal year for enterprise AI, moving beyond chatbots to deliver substantial corporate ROI
title_zh: Futurum CEO：AI 真正危机是算力短缺，而非泡沫
summary_zh: Futurum Group CEO Daniel Newman 认为，AI 行业真正的危机并非市场泡沫，而是全球算力严重短缺，无法满足“数十年超级周期”的需求。随着“代理型”AI 系统发展，算力强度将达到不可持续水平，未来 5-10 年将出现关键硬件短缺。他预测 2026 年将是企业 AI 转折年，AI 将从聊天机器人转向带来实质性企业回报。

title: Applied Materials, KLA Corporation, Lam Research, Seagate Technology, and Western Digital Stocks Trade Down, What You Need To Know
summary: Several technology stocks, including Applied Materials, KLA Corporation, Lam Research, Seagate Technology, and Western Digital, saw declines after a broader market rotation out of the technology sector. This profit-taking followed a recent rally, particularly in high-growth technology and AI-related stocks. Defense stocks benefited from this shift, surging on news of a proposed $1.5 trillion defense budget, which helped keep the S&P 500 flat despite the tech slump.
title_zh: 应用材料、科磊、泛林、希捷、西部数据集体下跌，板块轮动所致

title: Super Micro’s Rubin Rally: Is the AI Server Comeback Real?

title: AMD Reports Second Quarter 2025 Financial Results
summary: AMD announced strong financial results for the second quarter of 2025, with record revenue of $7.7 billion, up 32% year-over-year. The company's growth was driven by record server and PC processor sales, despite a significant impact from U.S. export controls on its MI308 data center GPU products. AMD also provided an optimistic outlook for the third quarter of 2025, expecting revenue of approximately $8.7 billion.

Despite strong demand, growth is somewhat constrained by production capacity, and the company notes risks from evolving trade policies and a new global minimum tax rate.

title_zh: 独家：Cadence 认罪并向美国支付 1.4 亿美元中国销售费用

In his new book, "Coming into view: how AI and other megatrends will shape your investments," Davis outlines two scenarios and advocates for a "megatrends-aware" portfolio that includes a greater allocation to actively managed funds, diverging from Vanguard's traditional passive in
title_zh: 先锋集团首席经济学家专注于大趋势和主动管理
summary_zh: 先锋集团首席经济学家乔·戴维斯表示，未来的投资回报将在很大程度上取决于人工智能的进步与负面人口统计和政府债务上升带来的挑战之间的相互作用。戴维斯在他的新书《走进视野：人工智能和其他大趋势将如何影响你的投资》中概述了两种情景，并倡导“大趋势感知”投资组合，其中包括更多地配置主动管理基金，这与先锋集团传统的被动管理基金不同。

title: Nvidia shares hit record as AI chipmaker again becomes world's most valuable company
summary: Nvidia's shares surged, closing at a new record high, driven by investor confidence in its AI leadership despite Chinese export controls. The company is now valued at $3.77 trillion, making it the world's most valuable company. Although China's market is largely closed to Nvidia, its data center business shows significant growth, with analysts projecting 53% revenue growth for the full fiscal year.
title_zh: 人工智能芯片制造商英伟达股价再创新高，成为全球最有价值的公司
summary_zh: 尽管中国实施出口管制，但由于投资者对其人工智能领导地位充满信心，英伟达股价飙升，收盘创下新高。该公司目前估值为3.77万亿美元，成为全球市值最高的公司。尽管中国市场基本上对英伟达关闭，但其数据中心业务却显示出显着增长，分析师预计整个财年收入增长53%。

title: Supermicro Raises $2 Billion Via Private Convertible Debt With 35% Conversion Premium
summary: Super Micro Computer announced it successfully priced its $2 billion convertible senior notes due 2030, which caused concerns about stock dilution. To mitigate this dilution, the company plans to use part of the proceeds for capped call transactions and to repurchase approximately 4.9 million shares. Despite past accusations of accounting manipulation and a significant stock drop, the company has seen its stock surge year-to-date and is expanding its server production capacity.
title_zh: Supermicro 通过私人可转换债券筹集 20 亿美元，转换溢价为 35%
summary_zh: Super Micro Computer 宣布成功定价其 2030 年到期的 20 亿美元可转换优先票据，引发了对股票稀释的担忧。为了减轻这种稀释，该公司计划将部分收益用于上限认购交易并回购约 490 万股股票。尽管过去曾受到会计操纵和库存大幅下跌的指控，但该公司今年迄今的库存仍在飙升，并正在扩大其服务器产能。

title: Texas Instruments plans to invest $60B in semiconductor fabs
summary: Texas Instruments announced plans to invest over $60 billion in seven semiconductor fabrication plants across Texas and Utah, marking one of the largest investments in the sector. This investment will significantly increase U.S. manufacturing capacity for 300mm chips, supported by $1.6 billion in funding from the CHIPS and Science Act, and will create more than 60,000 new jobs. The new fabs will produce chips for major companies like Apple, Ford, Medtronic, and Nvidia, enhancing the country's po
title_zh: 德州仪器 (TI) 计划投资 60B 美元建设半导体工厂
summary_zh: 德州仪器 (TI) 宣布计划投资超过 600 亿美元，在德克萨斯州和犹他州建设七个半导体制造厂，这是该行业最大的投资之一。在《CHIPS 和科学法案》16 亿美元资金的支持下，这项投资将显着提高美国 300mm 芯片的制造能力，并将创造超过 60,000 个新就业岗位。新工厂将为苹果、福特、美敦力和英伟达等大公司生产芯片，增强该国的竞争力。

title: Texas Instruments to invest $60B+ in US fab network
summary: Texas Instruments plans to invest over $60 billion to expand its chip manufacturing capacity in the U.S. This initiative includes building new fabs and expanding existing ones across three Texas and Utah campuses to produce billions of analog chips domestically. The project, partly comprising previously announced investments, aims to strengthen U.S. manufacturing, especially for AI infrastructure with partners like Nvidia.
title_zh: 德州仪器 (TI) 将投资 60B+ 美元建设美国晶圆厂网络
summary_zh: 德州仪器 (TI) 计划投资超过 600 亿美元扩大其在美国的芯片制造能力。该计划包括在德克萨斯州和犹他州的三个园区建设新工厂并扩建现有工厂，以便在国内生产数十亿个模拟芯片。该项目部分包括之前宣布的投资，旨在加强美国制造业，特别是与英伟达等合作伙伴的人工智能基础设施。

title: Marvell Introduces Optimized Integrated Power Solutions to Boost Performance, Efficiency, and ROI of Accelerated Infrastructure
summary: Marvell Technology, Inc. has launched its Package Integrated Voltage Regulator (PIVR) power solutions, designed to significantly enhance the performance, efficiency, and ROI of AI and cloud infrastructure for hyperscalers. These pre-validated solutions transition from board-level power delivery to integrated silicon chips, offering up to 2X higher current density and an 85% reduction in transmission losses. This innovation supports the development of 4+ kilowatt compute platforms, providing a fo
title_zh: Marvell 推出优化的集成电源解决方案，以提高加速基础设施的性能、效率和投资回报率
summary_zh: Marvell Technology, Inc. 推出了封装集成稳压器 (PIVR) 电源解决方案，旨在显着提高超大规模企业的人工智能和云基础设施的性能、效率和投资回报率。这些预先验证的解决方案从板级供电过渡到集成硅芯片，电流密度提高了 2 倍，传输损耗降低了 85%。这项创新支持 4+ 千瓦计算平台的开发，为

title: Meta investors cheer as Zuckerberg doubles down on AI commitment
summary: Meta Platforms Inc. continues to invest heavily in its artificial intelligence strategy, and investors are responding positively, driving the stock near record highs. The company recently finalized a $14.3 billion investment in Scale AI and raised its 2025 capital spending forecast to $72 billion. Analysts believe Meta's aggressive AI spending will translate into revenue growth and maintain its leadership position, despite the already impressive stock rally.
title_zh: 扎克伯格加倍致力于人工智能，Meta 投资者欢呼雀跃
summary_zh: Meta Platforms Inc.继续大力投资其人工智能战略，投资者反应积极，推动该股接近历史高位。该公司最近完成了对 Scale AI 的 143 亿美元投资，并将 2025 年资本支出预测上调至 720 亿美元。分析师认为，尽管股价已经大幅上涨，但 Meta 积极的人工智能支出将转化为收入增长并保持其领先地位。

title: GGLL Bulls Watch Willow—GGLS Bears Watch DC
summary: This article discusses the current performance of Alphabet Inc. (GOOGL) stock, which has seen a significant drop after reaching an all-time high in February. It explores two potential catalysts for the stock's future: Alphabet's new Willow quantum computing chip, which could drive growth and innovation, and looming antitrust risks and U.S. export controls, which could negatively impact the company. The article also highlights Direxion's leveraged ETFs, GGLL and GGLS, for traders looking to capit
title_zh: GGLL 公牛观察 Willow—GGLS 熊观察 DC
summary_zh: 本文讨论了 Alphabet Inc. (GOOGL) 股票目前的表现，该股票在 2 月份达到历史新高后已大幅下跌。它探讨了该股未来的两个潜在催化剂：Alphabet 的新型 Willow 量子计算芯片，它可以推动增长和创新，以及迫在眉睫的反垄断风险和美国出口管制，这可能对该公司产生负面影响。该文章还重点介绍了 Direxion 的杠杆 ETF、GGLL 和 GGLS，供希望投资的交易者参考

title: Synopsys suspends China sales; Ansys merger gets FTC nod
summary: Synopsys has suspended all sales to China due to new trade restrictions from the Trump administration, impacting a market that accounts for about 10% of its revenues. Concurrently, the Federal Trade Commission has conditionally approved Synopsys' $35 billion acquisition of Ansys, requiring divestment of certain assets—specifically optical software tools, photonic software tools, and power consumption analysis tools—to Keysight Technologies due to anticompetitive concerns. This follows similar re
title_zh: 新思科技暂停中国销售； Ansys 合并获得 FTC 批准
summary_zh: 由于特朗普政府新的贸易限制，Synopsys 已暂停对中国的所有销售，影响了占其收入约 10% 的市场。与此同时，联邦贸易委员会有条件批准新思科技以 350 亿美元收购 Ansys，出于反竞争考虑，要求将某些资产（特别是光学软件工具、光子软件工具和功耗分析工具）剥离给是德科技。这遵循类似的重新

title: Business Brief: BlackBerry is back
summary: BlackBerry Ltd., under new CEO John Giamatteo, has transformed from its smartphone-era identity to focus on becoming a dominant player in the software-defined vehicle market through its QNX division. The company has undertaken significant cost-cutting measures, including shedding its cybersecurity business, refinancing debt, and reducing headcount, putting it on stable financial footing. This strategic shift aims to re-establish BlackBerry as a technology leader, though it faces the challenge of
title_zh: 业务简介：黑莓又回来了
summary_zh: 在新任首席执行官 John Giamatteo 的领导下，黑莓有限公司已经从智能手机时代的形象转变为通过 QNX 部门成为软件定义汽车市场的主导者。该公司已采取重大成本削减措施，包括剥离网络安全业务、债务再融资和减少员工人数，从而建立稳定的财务基础。这一战略转变旨在重新确立黑莓作为技术领导者的地位，尽管它面临着以下挑战：

title: Synopsys Halts Financial Guidance as US Government Imposes Fresh China Export Controls
summary: Synopsys (NASDAQ: SNPS) has suspended its financial guidance for Q3 FY2025 and the full FY2025 after receiving a letter from the U.S. Department of Commerce's Bureau of Industry and Security (BIS) outlining new export restrictions related to China. The company is currently evaluating the potential impact of these restrictions on its business operations, financial results, and overall financial condition. This move indicates significant uncertainty regarding future performance due to the new gove
title_zh: 由于美国政府对中国实施新的出口管制，新思科技 (Synopsys) 暂停财务指引
summary_zh: Synopsys（纳斯达克股票代码：SNPS）在收到美国商务部工业与安全局 (BIS) 概述与中国相关的新出口限制的信函后，暂停了 2025 财年第三季度和整个 2025 财年的财务指引。该公司目前正在评估这些限制对其业务运营、财务业绩和整体财务状况的潜在影响。此举表明新政府对未来业绩的重大不确定性

title: The AI industrial trade has found its stride again. Why our newest stock is running ahead of the pack
summary: GE Vernova stock has surged to all-time highs, outperforming peers like Eaton and Vertiv in the AI industrial trade. This comes after fears of a slowdown in AI spending and the emergence of Chinese startup DeepSeek caused market volatility. Analysts suggest GE Vernova's earlier stage in its revenue upcycle and larger backlog contribute to its stronger performance, alongside strategic deals and support for the nuclear power industry.
title_zh: 人工智能产业贸易再次迈出步伐。为什么我们的最新库存遥遥领先
summary_zh: GE Vernova 股价已飙升至历史新高，在人工智能工业领域的表现优于伊顿和 Vertiv 等同行。此前，人们担心人工智能支出放缓以及中国初创公司 DeepSeek 的出现导致市场波动。分析师表示，GE Vernova 收入上升周期的早期阶段和更大的积压订单，以及战略交易和对核电行业的支持，有助于其更强的业绩。

title: New $200M SPAC IPO Targets Tech and Media Deals: Cal Redwood Hits Nasdaq with TMT Focus
summary: Cal Redwood Acquisition Corp. has priced its $200 million initial public offering, consisting of 20,000,000 units at $10.00 each, which will trade on the Nasdaq Global Market under "CRAQU" starting May 23, 2025. The SPAC aims to acquire businesses in the technology, media, and telecommunications (TMT) sector or those undergoing technology disruption. Cohen & Company Capital Markets and Seaport Global Securities are managing the offering.
title_zh: 新的 2 亿美元 SPAC IPO 瞄准科技和媒体交易：Cal Redwood 登陆纳斯达克，聚焦 TMT
summary_zh: Cal Redwood Acquisition Corp. 已将其首次公开募股定价为 2 亿美元，包括 20,000,000 股，每股 10 美元，将于 2025 年 5 月 23 日开始在纳斯达克全球市场以“CRAQU”交易。SPAC 旨在收购技术、媒体和电信 (TMT) 行业或正在经历技术颠覆的企业。 Cohen & Company Capital Markets 和 Seaport Global Securities 负责管理此次发行。

title: AGM Group announces 50-for-1 share consolidation
summary: AGM Group Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: AGMH) announced a 50-for-1 share consolidation, effective June 3, 2025, to meet Nasdaq's minimum bid price requirement. The company's stock price has declined significantly, but InvestingPro analysis suggests potential undervaluation, trading at 0.17 times book value. This consolidation reduces authorized shares to 8 million and aims to maintain their Nasdaq listing.
title_zh: 年度股东大会集团宣布 50 股合并为 1 股
summary_zh: AGM Group Holdings Inc.（纳斯达克股票代码：AGMH）宣布进行 50 股合并，自 2025 年 6 月 3 日起生效，以满足纳斯达克的最低收购价格要求。该公司股价已大幅下跌，但 InvestingPro 分析表明其估值可能被低估，目前市净率为 0.17 倍。此次合并将授权股数减少至 800 万股，旨在维持其在纳斯达克的上市地位。

title: Cathie Wood Doubles Down on Nvidia (NVDA) Stock Despite Selloff. Should You Copy Her?
summary: Cathie Wood's ARK Invest recently purchased over 107,000 shares of Nvidia (NVDA) and also invested in AMD, following a significant tech selloff and concerns about competition and chip export rules. The article discusses her rationale, including potential changes in U.S. chip export policies under a new administration, Nvidia's strong market position in AI accelerators, and growing demand from major tech companies. It then advises whether individual investors should follow Wood's lead, highlighti
title_zh: 尽管遭到抛售，凯西·伍德 (Cathie Wood) 还是加倍买入 Nvidia (NVDA) 股票。你应该效仿她吗？
summary_zh: 在科技股大幅抛售以及对竞争和芯片出口规则的担忧之后，Cathie Wood 的 ARK Invest 最近购买了 Nvidia (NVDA) 超过 107,000 股股票，并投资了 AMD。文章讨论了她的理由，包括新政府领导下的美国芯片出口政策的潜在变化、英伟达在人工智能加速器领域的强大市场地位，以及大型科技公司不断增长的需求。然后，它建议个人投资者是否应该效仿伍德的领导，强调

title: GIBO Holdings Stock Price, News & Analysis
summary: GIBO Holdings (NASDAQ: GIBO) operates in the internet content and information industry, specializing in an AI-generated content (AIGC) animation streaming platform for Asian users. The company has expanded its focus to include AI infrastructure, data centers, regional AI cloud partnerships, and applying AI to areas like sustainability and eVTOL aerial intelligence. GIBO recently underwent a share consolidation and successfully regained compliance with Nasdaq listing requirements, transferring it
title_zh: GIBO Holdings 股价、新闻与分析
summary_zh: GIBO Holdings (NASDAQ: GIBO) 主营互联网内容与信息行业，专注于面向亚洲用户的 AI 生成内容 (AIGC) 动画流媒体平台。公司已将业务拓展至 AI 基础设施、数据中心、区域 AI 云合作，以及将 AI 应用于可持续发展和 eVTOL 空中智能等领域。GIBO 近期完成股份合并，并成功重新符合纳斯达克上市要求。

title: Alphabet: Testimony From Apple Search Executive Rattles Investors
summary: Apple's Eddy Cue testified in the DOJ lawsuit against Alphabet, indicating Apple may end its long-term Google Search partnership for Safari. This news caused investor concern, given Google's significant revenue-sharing agreement with Apple. Despite potential changes and AI's impact on search, Morningstar maintains its fair value estimate for Alphabet, believing the market's reaction is overblown and that Google will adapt with AI-infused offerings.
title_zh: Alphabet：苹果搜索高管证词引发投资者担忧
summary_zh: 苹果 (Apple) 的 Eddy Cue 在针对 Alphabet (GOOGL) 的司法部诉讼中作证，暗示苹果可能终止与谷歌在 Safari 上的长期搜索合作。鉴于谷歌与苹果之间庞大的收入分成协议，这一消息引发投资者担忧。尽管存在潜在变化及 AI 对搜索的影响，Morningstar 维持对 Alphabet 的公允价值估计，认为市场反应过度，谷歌将通过 AI 增强产品适应变化。

title: Arista Networks beats expectations in its latest results, but stock moves lower
summary: Arista Networks reported strong first-quarter earnings and revenue, surpassing analyst expectations. Despite beating targets and seeing increased AI spending from key customers, the company's stock fell almost 4% after it warned of a sequential decline in gross and operating margins for the current quarter, disappointing investors. The company's board also approved an additional $1.5 billion in share repurchases.
title_zh: Arista Networks 业绩超预期，但股价下跌
summary_zh: Arista Networks (ANET) 公布的第一季度盈利和营收均超出分析师预期。尽管业绩超预期且关键客户 AI 支出增加，但公司警告本季度毛利率和营业利润率将环比下降，令投资者失望，股价下跌近 4%。董事会还批准了额外 15 亿美元的股票回购计划。

title: After Earnings, Is Alphabet Stock a Buy, a Sell, or Fairly Valued?
summary: Alphabet released solid first-quarter earnings with strong growth in sales and Google Cloud, despite macroeconomic uncertainties and antitrust concerns. Morningstar maintains a $237 per share fair value estimate, considering the stock significantly undervalued with a 5-star rating and a wide economic moat due to strong intangible assets and network effects. The company's financial strength is deemed unassailable, and continued investments in AI are expected to be value-accretive, positioning it
title_zh: 财报后，Alphabet 股票是买入、卖出还是估值合理？
summary_zh: Alphabet (GOOGL) 发布稳健的第一季度财报，销售和 Google Cloud 增长强劲，尽管存在宏观经济不确定性和反垄断担忧。Morningstar 维持每股 237 美元的公允价值估计，认为该股被显著低估，给予 5 星评级和宽经济护城河（基于强大的无形资产和网络效应）。公司财务实力被认为坚不可摧，持续 AI 投资预计将创造价值，使其处于有利地位。

title: Super Micro’s big warning is taking these stocks down with it
summary: Super Micro Computer Inc. issued a profit warning for its March quarter, which has caused nervousness among investors about its implications for the broader AI infrastructure market. The earnings shortfall is likely linked to customer transitions to newer Nvidia Corp. chips, but also raises questions about overall AI spending. This warning has affected related stocks and has investors concerned about the future of AI investment.
title_zh: Super Micro 的盈利预警拖累相关股票
summary_zh: Super Micro Computer Inc. (SMCI) 发布 3 月季度盈利预警，引发投资者对更广泛 AI 基础设施市场的担忧。盈利不及预期可能与客户转向英伟达 (Nvidia) 新芯片有关，但也引发对整体 AI 支出的质疑。该预警波及相关股票，投资者对 AI 投资前景感到不安。

title: Robotaxi maker Pony.ai sees Trump's trade war hitting sentiment, overseas expansion plans
summary: Pony.ai, a China-based robotaxi developer, anticipates that Donald Trump's trade war with China will negatively affect sentiment and the company's international expansion plans. While direct supply chain impact is expected to be minimal due to alternative suppliers and non-restricted chips, the company acknowledges the broader impact on its global ambitions, particularly after its Nasdaq listing. Pony.ai, backed by Toyota and using Nvidia chips, aims to rapidly expand its robotaxi services in nu
title_zh: Robotaxi 制造商 Pony.ai 称特朗普贸易战打击市场情绪与海外扩张
summary_zh: 中国 Robotaxi 开发商 Pony.ai 预计，特朗普对华贸易战将负面影响市场情绪及公司国际扩张计划。尽管由于替代供应商和非受限芯片，直接供应链影响预计较小，但公司承认对其全球雄心（尤其在纳斯达克上市后）产生更广泛影响。Pony.ai 由丰田 (Toyota) 支持并使用英伟达 (Nvidia) 芯片，计划在多个城市快速扩张 Robotaxi 服务。

title: GE Vernova CEO says current U.S. demand for electricity is the largest since the end of WWII
summary: GE Vernova CEO Scott Strazik stated that the current growth in U.S. electricity demand is the largest since the industrial buildout following World War II, driven by economic growth and new AI technology. The company reported strong quarterly results, beating estimates and maintaining full-year guidance, with gas turbine orders sold out for 2026 and 2027 due to increasing data center needs. Strazik emphasized the crucial role of gas in supporting energy needs and enabling further renewable energ
title_zh: GE Vernova CEO：当前美国电力需求为二战后最大
summary_zh: GE Vernova (GEV) CEO Scott Strazik 表示，受经济增长和 AI 新技术推动，当前美国电力需求增长为二战后工业建设以来最大。公司季度业绩强劲，超出预期并维持全年指引，因数据中心需求增长，燃气轮机订单已排至 2026 和 2027 年。Strazik 强调天然气在支持能源需求和推动可再生能源发展中的关键作用。

title: Alphabet: Ad Tech Antitrust Decision Carries Weight but Is Not a Major Risk
summary: A US District Court judge found Alphabet (GOOG) to have an illegal monopoly in the sell-side ad market but rejected claims regarding the advertiser network market. While the decision carries weight, Morningstar believes the market had largely priced in an adverse outcome and maintains its fair value estimate of $237 for Alphabet, viewing its shares as materially undervalued given the Google Network business's declining sales and prior offers to spin it off. Alphabet plans to appeal the decision,
title_zh: Alphabet：广告技术反垄断裁决影响重大但非主要风险
summary_zh: 美国地区法院法官裁定 Alphabet (GOOG) 在卖方广告市场拥有非法垄断，但驳回关于广告商网络市场的指控。Morningstar 认为市场已基本消化不利结果，维持 Alphabet 每股 237 美元的公允价值估计，认为其股票被显著低估，因 Google Network 业务销售下滑且此前曾提议剥离。Alphabet 计划上诉。

title: Tech giant says it'll start manufacturing supercomputer parts in Houston
summary: Nvidia Corp. announced plans to begin manufacturing supercomputer parts in Houston, partnering with Foxconn for the production plant. This move, along with investments in AI chip production in Phoenix and another supercomputer plant in Dallas, will contribute to approximately 1 million square feet of U.S.-based production capacity. Nvidia's CEO Jensen Huang stated that U.S. production of AI infrastructure is happening for the first time.
title_zh: 英伟达将在休斯顿生产超算部件
summary_zh: Nvidia Corp. 宣布与富士康合作，在休斯顿建厂生产超算部件。加上凤凰城的AI芯片产线和达拉斯的另一超算工厂，Nvidia在美国将拥有约100万平方英尺的生产能力。CEO黄仁勋称，这是AI基础设施首次在美国本土生产。利好NVDA，强化美国AI供应链自主化趋势。

title: 3 Hot New IPOs Defying the 2025 Market Slump
summary: Despite a general market slump in 2025, three recent IPOs — Tempus AI (TEM), ServiceTitan (TTAN), and CoreWeave (CRWV) — have shown strong performance or limited losses. Tempus AI has seen significant returns due to its AI-enabled health concierge app and data sales, while ServiceTitan has brought technology to traditional trades and improved profitability. CoreWeave, backed by NVIDIA and OpenAI, gained attention by providing access to GPUs for AI development and has performed well since its IPO
title_zh: 三只新股逆市走强：TEM、TTAN、CRWV
summary_zh: 2025年市场整体低迷，但Tempus AI (TEM)、ServiceTitan (TTAN) 和 CoreWeave (CRWV) 三只IPO表现强劲或跌幅有限。TEM受益于AI健康助手应用和数据销售；TTAN为传统行业提供技术升级并改善盈利；CRWV获NVIDIA和OpenAI支持，提供GPU算力服务，上市后表现良好。关注AI应用和基础设施新股机会。

title: Newegg announces reverse stock split to maintain Nasdaq listing
summary: Newegg Commerce, Inc. announced a twenty-to-one reverse stock split, effective April 7, 2025, to meet Nasdaq's minimum price per share requirement, as its stock trades at $0.27 and has declined nearly 32% year-to-date. The company's financial health is rated as weak by InvestingPro, with concerns in profitability and price momentum, despite the company also recently expanding its product lineup with new AMD and NVIDIA GPUs. The split will proportionately increase the par value of shares and frac
title_zh: Newegg宣布合股以维持纳斯达克上市
summary_zh: Newegg Commerce, Inc. 宣布20比1反向拆股，4月7日生效，以符合纳斯达克最低股价要求。当前股价$0.27，年初至今跌近32%。公司财务健康评级弱，盈利和价格动能堪忧，尽管近期新增AMD和NVIDIA GPU产品线。合股不改变基本面，短期或面临卖压。

title: Latham & Watkins Advises on CoreWeave's US$1.5 Billion IPO
summary: Latham & Watkins LLP advised the underwriters for CoreWeave's initial public offering of 37,500,000 shares of Class A common stock at US$40 per share, totaling US$1.5 billion. The AI hyperscaler's shares began trading on the Nasdaq Global Select Market under the ticker symbol "CRWV" on March 28, 2025, with the offering expected to close on March 31, 2025. A multidisciplinary Latham team represented the underwriters, covering corporate, intellectual property, data privacy, tax, anti-corruption, c
title_zh: CoreWeave 15亿美元IPO获Latham & Watkins法律支持
summary_zh: Latham & Watkins LLP 担任CoreWeave IPO承销商法律顾问，发行3750万股A类普通股，每股$40，募资15亿美元。股票于3月28日在纳斯达克上市，代码CRWV。多领域法律团队覆盖公司、知识产权、数据隐私、税务、反腐败等。CRWV作为AI基础设施龙头，IPO获顶级律所背书，增强市场信心。

title: Major AI Infrastructure Player CoreWeave Launches $1.5 Billion Nasdaq IPO at $40 Per Share
summary: CoreWeave, an AI Hyperscaler, has priced its Initial Public Offering (IPO) at $40.00 per share, aiming to raise approximately $1.46 billion. The offering includes 37.5 million shares of Class A common stock, with the majority sold by CoreWeave and a smaller portion by existing stockholders. Trading on the Nasdaq Global Select Market under the ticker 'CRWV' is set to begin on March 28, 2025, with major financial institutions like Morgan Stanley, J.P. Morgan, and Goldman Sachs leading the process.
title_zh: CoreWeave IPO定价$40，募资约14.6亿美元
summary_zh: AI基础设施公司CoreWeave将其IPO定价为每股$40，发行3750万股A类普通股，募资约14.6亿美元。股票将于3月28日在纳斯达克上市，代码CRWV。摩根士丹利、摩根大通和高盛担任主承销商。CRWV作为AI算力提供商，IPO规模可观，反映市场对AI基础设施需求旺盛。

title: S&P 500 Gains and Losses Today: Supermicro, Arista Networks, and Nvidia Lead Tech Selloff
summary: The S&P 500 fell 1.1% on Wednesday, March 26, 2025, as a tech selloff led by Super Micro Computer, Arista Networks, and Nvidia, combined with news of potential tariffs on car imports, impacted the market. Super Micro Computer shares plunged after a Goldman Sachs downgrade, while Nvidia stock slipped amid concerns over AI chip sales in China. In contrast, Cintas shares surged after better-than-expected earnings, with Paychex also gaining from its quarterly report, and Dollar Tree rose after annou
title_zh: 标普500科技股领跌：SMCI、ANET、NVDA下挫
summary_zh: 3月26日标普500跌1.1%，科技股领跌，Super Micro Computer (SMCI) 因高盛降级暴跌，Arista Networks (ANET) 和 Nvidia (NVDA) 受AI芯片在华销售担忧拖累。汽车进口关税消息也施压市场。Cintas (CTAS) 因财报超预期上涨，Paychex (PAYX) 和 Dollar Tree (DLTR) 也录得涨幅。科技板块短期承压，关注关税和AI监管风险。

title: CoreWeave aims to raise up to $2.7 billion in IPO
summary: CoreWeave, a company specializing in providing Nvidia's AI processors, plans to raise up to $2.7 billion in its upcoming initial public offering. The company updated its prospectus, setting a price range of $47 to $55 per share, valuing it at up to $26.5 billion. CoreWeave has experienced rapid growth, with a significant portion of its revenue coming from clients like Microsoft, which utilizes CoreWeave's services to meet OpenAI's demand.
title_zh: CoreWeave IPO目标募资27亿美元
summary_zh: CoreWeave 计划通过IPO募资至多27亿美元，更新招股书将价格区间设为$47-$55，估值最高达265亿美元。公司主营Nvidia AI处理器租赁，增长迅猛，大部分收入来自微软等客户，后者利用其服务满足OpenAI需求。CRWV作为AI算力基础设施龙头，IPO规模扩大，反映市场对AI算力需求的高度认可。

title: Micron forecasts upbeat quarterly revenue on strong AI memory chip demand
summary: Micron Technology projected third-quarter revenue above Wall Street estimates, driven by robust demand for its high-bandwidth memory (HBM) chips crucial for AI models. The company reported that all its HBM chips are sold out for calendar year 2025, indicating strong market confidence. Micron also expects improved profitability in fiscal 2025 across both data center and consumer markets, despite potential uncertainties from new tariffs.
title_zh: 美光预测营收超预期，AI内存芯片需求强劲
summary_zh: Micron Technology (MU) 预计第三财季营收高于华尔街预期，得益于AI模型所需的高带宽内存 (HBM) 芯片需求旺盛。公司表示2025年HBM芯片已全部售罄，市场信心强劲。美光还预计2025财年数据中心和消费市场盈利能力均将改善，尽管新关税带来不确定性。利好MU，AI内存需求持续高景气。

title: Fiserv, PayPal and FIS change up board members
summary: Payments companies Fiserv, PayPal, FIS, and Klarna have recently updated their board memberships amidst increased merger and acquisition activity and the industry's rapid evolution. PayPal welcomed Joy Chik, an AI expert, to its board, while Fiserv appointed Stephanie Cohen as an independent director shortly after acquiring Dutch payments company CCV. FIS saw a board reduction with Lee Adrean's departure, and Klarna added two new members ahead of its planned initial public offering, a move that
title_zh: 支付三巨头 Fiserv、PayPal、FIS 调整董事会
summary_zh: 支付公司 Fiserv (FI)、PayPal (PYPL)、FIS (FIS) 及 Klarna 近期在并购活跃与行业快速演变的背景下更新董事会。PayPal 迎来 AI 专家 Joy Chik 加入；Fiserv 在收购荷兰支付公司 CCV 后任命 Stephanie Cohen 为独立董事；FIS 因 Lee Adrean 离职而缩减董事会规模；Klarna 在计划 IPO 前新增两名成员。

title: GE Vernova CEO sees order backlog stretching into 2028
summary: GE Vernova's CEO, Scott Strazik, announced that the company's order backlog for power-generation equipment, including gas turbines, power transformers, and switchgear, is expected to stretch into 2028, with the company likely to be sold out through the end of '28 by late summer. He noted that despite significant interest in artificial intelligence at the CERAWeek conference, only a small portion of the current backlog is AI-related, indicating future growth potential. The article also touches on
title_zh: GE Vernova CEO：订单积压已排至 2028 年
summary_zh: GE Vernova (GEV) CEO Scott Strazik 表示，包括燃气轮机、电力变压器和开关设备在内的发电设备订单积压预计将持续到 2028 年，公司可能在夏末前售罄至 2028 年底。尽管 CERAWeek 会议上 AI 话题热度极高，但目前仅小部分积压订单与 AI 相关，暗示未来增长潜力。

title: [News] NAND Prices on the Rise: Micron and SanDisk Lead in April, with Samsung, SK hynix Likely to Follow
summary: Micron and SanDisk are initiating NAND price hikes, with SanDisk planning over 10% increase from April 1, signaling a market turnaround. Samsung and SK hynix are also expected to follow suit with their own price increases. This shift is attributed to anticipated demand surpassing supply, manufacturers' production cuts, reduced smartphone inventory, and growing demand from AI and DeepSeek applications.
title_zh: NAND 涨价潮：美光、SanDisk 领涨 4 月，三星、SK 海力士或跟进
summary_zh: 美光 (MU) 和 SanDisk 率先启动 NAND 涨价，SanDisk 计划自 4 月 1 日起涨幅超 10%，标志市场转向。三星、SK 海力士预计也将跟进。涨价原因包括预期需求超供给、厂商减产、智能手机库存下降以及 AI 和 DeepSeek 应用带来的需求增长。

title: US OPEN: Selloff on Monday as Uncertainty Continues
summary: US markets experienced a selloff on Monday, with major indices showing negative performance and the VIX fear gauge climbing, indicating rising market anxiety. European markets also saw significant declines, while specific company news included Google Chrome divestiture pressures, plummeting Tesla China sales, Rocket Companies acquiring Redfin, and Robinhood settling with FINRA for $30 million.
title_zh: 美股开盘：不确定性持续，周一遭遇抛售
summary_zh: 美国市场周一遭遇抛售，主要指数表现疲软，VIX 恐慌指数攀升，显示市场焦虑加剧。欧洲市场也大幅下跌。个股方面：Google (GOOGL) 面临 Chrome 分拆压力；特斯拉 (TSLA) 中国销量暴跌；Rocket Companies (RKT) 收购 Redfin (RDFN)；Robinhood (HOOD) 与 FINRA 达成 3000 万美元和解。

title: Wall Street Goes From Hope to Panic as Nasdaq 100 Nears a Correction
summary: The Nasdaq 100 is approaching correction territory, signaling a shift from investor optimism to panic, particularly impacting high-flying technology and chip stocks. This downturn follows a period of significant growth driven by artificial intelligence enthusiasm, which saw the index reach 53 record highs since March 2023. The article highlights the rapid change in market sentiment, moving from seemingly limitless investor appetite to a sharp selloff.
title_zh: 华尔街从希望转向恐慌，纳斯达克 100 逼近回调
summary_zh: 纳斯达克 100 指数逼近回调区间，投资者情绪从乐观急转恐慌，高飞的科技和芯片股首当其冲。此前 AI 热潮推动该指数自 2023 年 3 月以来创下 53 次历史新高，如今市场情绪迅速逆转，出现大幅抛售。

title: What is CoreWeave, the cloud-services provider expected to go public next week?
summary: CoreWeave, an AI cloud services provider, is preparing for an initial public offering slated for next week. The company operates 32 data centers housing over 250,000 Nvidia GPUs, with Nvidia itself holding a 6% stake and acting as a key partner. CoreWeave's customer concentration could be a concern for potential investors as it enters the public market.

title_zh: CoreWeave 是什么？AI 云服务商下周 IPO
summary_zh: AI 云服务提供商 CoreWeave 计划于下周进行 IPO。该公司运营 32 个数据中心，配备超 25 万块英伟达 (NVDA) GPU，英伟达持有其 6% 股份并作为关键合作伙伴。客户集中度可能成为潜在投资者的担忧点。

title: [News] Applied Materials Faces $400M Revenue Loss as Part of Maintenance Services Halted in China
summary: Applied Materials is expected to lose $400 million in revenue in FY2025 due to halted equipment maintenance services in China, with half of this impact occurring in the current quarter. This is a direct consequence of stricter U.S. export controls, which have also affected other companies like ASML. Despite this, Applied Materials reported a 7% year-over-year revenue increase in Q1 FY25, driven by strong demand for advanced equipment for AI components, though it forecasts a slight revenue declin
title_zh: 应用材料在华维护服务暂停，FY2025 收入损失 4 亿美元
summary_zh: 应用材料 (AMAT) 因中国设备维护服务暂停，预计 FY2025 收入损失 4 亿美元，其中一半影响发生在当前季度。这是美国出口管制收紧的直接后果，ASML (ASML) 等公司也受波及。尽管 Q1 FY25 收入同比增长 7%（受 AI 组件先进设备需求推动），但公司预计收入将小幅下滑。

title: SMCI stock price: Super Micro Computer shares are falling ahead of an expected Nasdaq delisting update
summary: Super Micro Computer (SMCI) shares are down in premarket trading ahead of its Q2 2025 earnings announcement and a critical Nasdaq delisting deadline. The company faces potential delisting if its Form 10-K is not filed with the SEC within two weeks, following a period of extreme volatility caused by alleged accounting irregularities, a DOJ investigation, and the resignation of its auditor, Ernst & Young. Investors are keenly awaiting updates that will clarify the company's future as a publicly tr
title_zh: SMCI 股价下跌：超微电脑面临纳斯达克退市更新
summary_zh: 超微电脑 (SMCI) 盘前下跌，市场等待其 Q2 2025 财报及关键的纳斯达克退市截止日。若两周内未向 SEC 提交 Form 10-K，公司可能面临退市。此前因会计违规指控、DOJ 调查及审计师安永辞职，股价剧烈波动。投资者密切关注其作为上市公司的未来走向。

title: Lessons for ETF Investors From Winners and Losers of DeepSeek AI Stock Selloff
summary: The emergence of DeepSeek AI's new model has caused a divergence in performance among AI-focused ETFs, highlighting the importance of understanding a fund's strategy. While hardware-centric AI stocks experienced a selloff, software-oriented funds prevailed, demonstrating how technological advancements can reshape investment landscapes in the AI sector. Investors continued to show confidence in the long-term potential of AI, as evidenced by net inflows into US-domiciled AI and Big Data funds desp
title_zh: DeepSeek AI抛售潮中ETF赢家与输家的启示
summary_zh: DeepSeek AI新模型引发AI主题ETF表现分化，凸显理解基金策略的重要性。硬件类AI股遭抛售，而软件类基金逆势上涨，显示技术变革如何重塑AI投资格局。尽管市场波动，美国AI及大数据基金仍录得净流入，表明投资者对AI长期潜力保持信心。

title: These ETFs can help investors protect themselves from selloffs like the DeepSeek panic — but here’s the catch
summary: Buffer ETFs have outperformed the broader market this week amidst the DeepSeek panic and technology stock selloff, offering investors a potential protective strategy. However, analysts caution that investors should understand the inherent trade-offs before integrating these ETFs into their portfolios. The article also touches on leveraged ETFs tied to Nvidia, which continue to attract investors despite recent market volatility.
title_zh: 缓冲ETF可助投资者抵御DeepSeek式恐慌抛售，但需注意代价
summary_zh: 本周DeepSeek恐慌及科技股抛售中，缓冲ETF跑赢大盘，提供潜在保护策略。但分析师警告，投资者需充分理解其内在权衡。文章还提及Nvidia相关杠杆ETF，尽管近期波动，仍持续吸引资金流入。

title: DeepSeek Panic Live Updates: Nvidia Stock Drops 4% As Trump Reportedly Targets China Exports
summary: Nvidia's stock experienced a turbulent week, dropping 4% on Wednesday, amid concerns over a less capital-intensive AI model from China's DeepSeek and reports that Donald Trump is considering stricter export controls on semiconductor chip sales to China. The market volatility, driven by DeepSeek's competitive AI model and potential geopolitical shifts, prompted analysts to reassess the AI investment landscape, though many still view Nvidia's selloff as an overreaction. DeepSeek's emergence has le
title_zh: DeepSeek恐慌实时更新：Nvidia跌4%，特朗普据报拟收紧对华出口
summary_zh: Nvidia本周剧烈波动，周三跌4%，因中国DeepSeek推出低算力AI模型，且特朗普考虑加强半导体对华出口管制。市场波动源于DeepSeek的竞争性模型及潜在地缘政治变化，促使分析师重估AI投资格局，但多数认为Nvidia抛售过度。

title: AI stock rout: The US selloff in 4 charts
summary: US stocks experienced a selloff, particularly in large-cap growth, following news that Chinese AI startup DeepSeek developed an advanced AI model that requires less sophisticated semiconductor chips. This development triggered concerns about the necessity of significant capital expenditures by large US tech companies in generative AI, leading to a 17% plunge in Nvidia stock and declines in other chipmakers and utility stocks. However, some tech giants like Apple and Meta Platforms saw gains, and
title_zh: AI股暴跌：美国抛售潮四图解析
summary_zh: 中国AI初创DeepSeek开发出无需尖端芯片的先进模型，引发美国大盘成长股抛售，Nvidia暴跌17%，芯片及公用事业股跟跌。市场担忧美国科技巨头在生成式AI上的巨额资本支出必要性。但Apple、Meta等逆势上涨，显示板块分化。

title: AI Stock Rout: Monday’s Selloff in 5 Charts
summary: A new AI model from Chinese startup DeepSeek, which performs advanced AI tasks without relying on the most advanced semiconductor chips, triggered a significant selloff in AI-related stocks on Monday. Nvidia plunged 17%, and other chipmakers and AI-beneficiary sectors like utilities also saw steep declines. However, some large-cap tech names like Apple and Meta Platforms posted gains, and Morningstar analysts maintain their fair value estimates for key tech companies, anticipating long-term bene
title_zh: AI股溃败：周一抛售潮五图详解
summary_zh: 中国初创DeepSeek推出不依赖最先进芯片的AI模型，周一引发AI相关股大幅抛售。Nvidia暴跌17%，芯片及受益于AI的公用事业板块重挫。但Apple、Meta等大盘科技股上涨，Morningstar分析师维持主要科技公司公允价值预估，看好长期受益。

title: European regulator approves Synopsys’ $35bn Ansys acquisition after companies agree to divest software assets
summary: The European Commission has approved Synopsys' $35 billion acquisition of Ansys on the condition that both companies divest certain software assets. Synopsys will sell its Optical Solutions Group and other optics/photonics offerings, while Ansys will divest its PowerArtist software to maintain competition in specific markets. The deal still awaits full approval from the UK's CMA and the US FTC, though the CMA is considering similar undertakings.
title_zh: 欧盟批准Synopsys 350亿美元收购Ansys，附条件剥离软件资产
summary_zh: 欧盟委员会附条件批准Synopsys以350亿美元收购Ansys，要求双方剥离特定软件资产。Synopsys将出售光学解决方案集团等产品，Ansys剥离PowerArtist软件以维持竞争。交易尚待英国CMA及美国FTC批准，CMA正考虑类似承诺。

The author outlines Color Star's questionable business practices, including its brief, tumultuous partnership with the Philadelphia 76ers, its series of ever-changing CEOs, and its pattern of announcing non-existent ventures and partnerships with seemingly fake entities. title: Markets News, January 7, 2025: Stocks Slide as Treasury Yields Rise After Economic Data; Nvidia Leads Tech Selloff; Bitcoin Plunges
summary: Stocks closed sharply lower on January 7, 2025, with major indexes like the S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite falling, while the Dow Jones Industrial Average also slipped. This downturn was driven by rising Treasury yields following stronger-than-expected economic data, particularly in the labor market, which suggested the Federal Reserve might not cut interest rates as quickly as anticipated. Nvidia led a broader tech selloff despite initial gains from its CEO's CES keynote, and Bitcoin plunged belo
title_zh: 市场日报：经济数据推升美债收益率，Nvidia领跌科技股，比特币暴跌
summary_zh: 2025年1月7日，美股大幅收跌，标普500、纳斯达克及道指齐跌。强于预期的经济数据（尤其劳动力市场）推升美债收益率，市场预期美联储降息步伐放缓。Nvidia领跌科技股，尽管CEO CES主题演讲曾带来短暂涨幅；比特币跌破关键位。

title: Best and worst performing ETFs of 2024
summary: The article reviews the best and worst-performing ETFs of 2024, highlighting that trends from the previous year, particularly the strong performance of tech and blockchain ETFs, largely continued. Tech ETFs benefited from outperforming earnings and the rise of AI, while blockchain ETFs were boosted by interest rate cuts, spot bitcoin ETF approvals, and crypto advocacy. title_zh: 2024年最佳与最差表现ETF盘点
summary_zh: 文章回顾了2024年表现最佳与最差的ETF，指出前一年趋势（尤其是科技和区块链ETF的强劲表现）基本延续。科技ETF受益于超预期的盈利和AI崛起，区块链ETF则受降息、现货比特币ETF获批及加密货币利好推动。相反，清洁能源和巴西ETF表现垫底，前者延续颓势，后者受宏观经济拖累。
